creator: AUSSIE FITNESS 🇦🇺💪🏼 | Dez Cerimagic
source_text:
High Protein Creamy Caramelized Onion Chicken Pasta🍝
66g Protein Meal Prep💪🏼

(Macros: Per Serving - 6 Total)
663 Calories
71gC | 10gF | 66gP

Comment “meal prep” below & i’ll message you my newly updated high protein digital cookbooks with 300+ recipes! 👨🏻‍🍳📚

Ingredients:
1.2KG Thinly Sliced Boneless & Skinless Chicken Breast (raw weight)
2 Tsp Italian Herb Seasoning Mix, 2 Tsp Smoked Paprika, 1 Tsp Salt, 1.5 Tsp Garlic Powder, 1.5 Tsp Onion Powder
1 Tsp Olive Oil
3 Large Sliced Brown Onions
100g Tomato Paste
1 Whole Garlic Bulb (Cut Top Off)
60g Freshly Grated Parmesan Cheese
Fresh Parsley
140g Light Cream Cheese
150g Sweet Soy Sauce (Kecap Manis Sweet Soy Sauce - can be substituted for low sodium alternatives)
450ml Fat Free Evaporated Milk (Carnation Light & Creamy)
480g Spiral Pasta (or your choice of pasta - dry weight)
Optional & Customisable Toppings: Chilli Crisp, Grated Parmesan Cheese & Parsley

#pasta #onion #highprotein #healthyrecipes #mealprep
